response:
Here’s a warm and concise goodbye email for your coworkers:

---
**Subject:** Thank You for the Great Time

Dear Team,

It’s been an incredible experience working with all of you—your support, collaboration, and kindness made every day so much brighter. I’m truly grateful for the friendships and memories we’ve created together. While I’m excited for what’s next, I’ll miss being part of this team. Please keep in touch, and I hope our paths cross again soon. Wishing you all the best in your future endeavors!

Best,
[Your Name]
---
